summary: All three missing_verification discrepancies documented as skipped_planned_verification: the planned commands used non-class-qualified pytest IDs that collect zero tests; the class-qualified equivalents (TestBoundedPreOptimizeRetention::) were confirmed run in observed verification.

The class-qualified equivalent (tests/test_backup.py::TestBoundedPreOptimizeRetention::test_pre_optimize_default_retention_does_not_prune_manual_or_explicit_out) was run and confirmed in observed verification.
